{{Quote|You tell 'em, Leia!|Darlen to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="Imperial Spy">{{Kids1997Cite|issue1=11|issue2=15|story=Imperial Spy}}</ref>}}
'''Darlen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] aristocrat who escaped its [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].

==Biography==
Before its destruction, she had been a friend of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. She was later suspected by Leia to be an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] spy, but this later turned out to be false. Darlen married another Alderaanian survivor, [[Tolok]], and had a baby.

==Appearances==
*{{Kids1997Cite|issue1=11|issue2=15|story=Imperial Spy}} {{1st}}
